title: T-011 — OEE consumer read-model (oee_daily_summary view via 15-OEE) + graceful degradation (12-REPORTING §6 D-RPT-9, §10/§4.1 #5)
prompt:
# T-011 — OEE consumer read-model

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §6 D-RPT-9 (OEE consumer 15-OEE single source of truth), §4.1 #5 (OEE Summary P1 dashboard), §5 Biznesowe (15-OEE oee_daily_summary MV wymagana)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide a thin consumer wrapper over the 15-OEE-owned `oee_daily_summary` MV so reporting dashboards (Factory Overview tile, RPT-005 OEE Summary, P2 Shift Performance) can read with org+site filter without duplicating aggregation logic. 15-OEE module has zero atomic tasks today — implement graceful degradation: if 15-OEE MV is missing, return `{ available: false, placeholder: ... }` so dashboards render the "OEE data unavailable" placeholder per D-RPT-9 con-clause.

## Implementation contract
1. Service helper `packages/reporting/src/queries/oee-consumer.ts`:
   - `getOeeDailySummary({orgId, siteId, lineId?, dateRange})` → reads `oee_daily_summary` (15-OEE owned).
   - Detect MV presence via `pg_matviews` query at startup; cache result with 1-min TTL.
   - If absent → return `{available: false, reason: 'oee_module_not_deployed', placeholder: { yield_pct: null, oee_pct: null, ... }}`.
   - If present → execute query with `WHERE org_id = app.current_org_id() AND (site_id = $current OR site_id IS NULL)` and return real data.
   - Subscribe (via outbox consumer pattern) to `oee.snapshot.aggregated` event per D-RPT-9 — increments a local cache counter for smart invalidation (no duplicate aggregation).
2. Type definition `OeeSummary` derived from KPI glossary T-002 entries (oee_pct, oee_availability_pct, oee_performance_pct, oee_quality_pct).
3. Outbox subscriber registration in `apps/worker/src/jobs/reporting-oee-subscriber.ts` consuming `oee.snapshot.aggregated` events (Foundation T-112 outbox consumer); on receipt, mark in-memory `oee_cache_counter` for `getDashboardsCatalog` cache invalidation.
4. Vitest contract test: (a) helper returns placeholder when MV absent, (b) helper returns real data when MV present with seeded rows, (c) cross-org leak test, (d) outbox subscriber increments cache counter on `oee.snapshot.aggregated` event, (e) type definition matches KPI glossary keys exactly.

## Files
- packages/reporting/src/queries/oee-consumer.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/types/oee.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/jobs/reporting-oee-subscriber.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/__tests__/oee-consumer.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 15-OEE module is NOT deployed (oee_daily_summary MV absent), when getOeeDailySummary is called, then it returns `{available: false, reason: 'oee_module_not_deployed', placeholder: {...}}` without throwing.
2. Given 15-OEE oee_daily_summary MV exists and has seeded rows for org_A, when getOeeDailySummary({orgId: org_A_id, ...}) is called under app.set_org_context(org_A) session, then it returns `{available: true, data: [...]}` with rows scoped to org_A only (cross-org leak test passes).
3. Given `oee.snapshot.aggregated` outbox event is received by the subscriber, when the counter is checked, then it increments by 1 and cache invalidation fires.
4. Given the type definition is compared to KPI glossary T-002 entries for oee_*, when matched, then the four oee_* keys appear with identical units and weighting (consumer of glossary).
5. Given a request for OEE summary with no org context, when invoked, then it throws MissingOrgContextError before any SQL is issued.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: `packages/reporting/__tests__/oee-consumer.test.ts` covers 5 ACs with testcontainers Postgres in two configurations (MV present and absent).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/reporting test oee-consumer`.
- GREEN: write service helper + types + outbox subscriber.

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate OEE aggregation logic (D-RPT-9 con-clause; 15-OEE owns oee_daily_summary).
- Do not let helper throw when MV absent — graceful degradation with placeholder (D-RPT-9).
- Do not read MV without org+site WHERE clause (RLS-via-service-layer per §5 Techniczne; MVs cannot host policies).
- Do not poll for OEE updates — subscribe to `oee.snapshot.aggregated` via outbox consumer.
- Do not couple the type definition to 15-OEE internals — read only the KPI keys defined in KPI glossary (T-002).
- Do not make the placeholder shape configurable per dashboard — fixed schema so UI tasks can render uniformly.
